summary: D5 soundness and completeness proved. D5Soundness.lean proves all 7 D5Axiom constructors valid over serial+Euclidean frames. D5Completeness.lean proves completeness via canonical model with truth_lemma_d, canonical_serial, and canonical_eucl_from_5. Full build passes, lean_verify clean on both theorems.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary for D5 soundness and completeness
